falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is SUPPORTED if Argentina's INDEC headline poverty rate exceeds the pre-Milei December 2023 baseline by at least 5 percentage points at any point during 2024-2025, AND if real private-formal-sector wages fall at least 10% below the December 2023 level over the same window. REFUTED if poverty rate trends flat or below baseline and real wages decline less than 3%.
falsification_test_text: Argentina interrupted time-series (2020Q1-2025Q4) of INDEC EPH poverty headcount and IPC-deflated private-formal real wage on Milei-2023Q4 break; Newey-West SE. Refute if poverty <+5pp peak and real wage drop <3% across 2024-2025.

variables_missing.name: milei_shock_therapy_break
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 for ARG from 2023-12 (Milei inauguration).
